title: Go to see 30 and get a blue bandanna
display_title: Go to see 30 and get a blue bandanna
wikitext:
[]: Go to see 3.0 and get a blue bandanna             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu Jul 12, 2012 6:35 am I think. http://eva3.0.b-ch.com/blog/3_0/archives/8

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Thu Jul 12, 2012 10:02 am If you buy tickets when they go on sale this Saturday. The bandana is only at the theaters marked in the right-hand column on the list of places screening the film: http://ticket.evangelion.co.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:00 pm Yay 3.0 Bandanna's seems like a nice extra.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:38 pm I hope this is tied in to something that's actually featured prominently in the movie. Like Solid Snake or something.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Thu Jul 12, 2012 12:51 pm ^ The movie better have a lot of cardboard boxes then.

[]:             Quote Post by Ceimoa Nan » Thu Jul 12, 2012 8:53 pm chee wrote: I hope this is tied in to something that's actually featured prominently in the movie. Like Solid Snake or something.

[]:             Quote Post by driftking18594 » Fri Jul 13, 2012 7:37 am There's going to be someone who will wear it over their left eye.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jul 13, 2012 10:57 am Ceimoa Nan wrote: Or rather, Solid Rei, Liquid Rei, and Solidus Rei. And Naked Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 13, 2012 12:30 pm More pretty things here: http://www.evastore.jp/real/blog/ Shut up and take my monkey-fighting money!

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Jul 13, 2012 12:39 pm wtf is this?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Fri Jul 13, 2012 12:50 pm That thing ain't eva related. I *think* its part of a exhibition that Anno is curating: http://www.ntv.co.jp/tokusatsu/english.html

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 13, 2012 12:56 pm Not related, it's from Nausicaa: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/538232/Hideaki-Anno-WANTED-To-Direct-a-Nausicaa-2/#538232

[]:             Quote Post by qu4d » Fri Jul 13, 2012 1:22 pm Interesting. Could have been Eva 07, though :P

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Fri Jul 13, 2012 6:01 pm chee wrote: Solid Snake or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Jul 13, 2012 6:17 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Fri Jul 13, 2012 7:16 pm ^ Nailed it

[]:             Quote Post by Ceimoa Nan » Sun Jul 15, 2012 2:13 am chee wrote: No. Just Solid Snake.
